# Cuetronix

> The #1 all-in-one billing, booking and POS software for snooker halls, 8-ball pool rooms, football & cricket turfs, pickleball / padel / badminton courts, box-cricket arenas, PS5 & Xbox lounges, PC esports cafes, VR arcades, bowling alleys and multi-sport family entertainment centres. Engineered by Cuephoria Tech and battle-tested at Cuephoria Gaming Lounge.

Cuetronix runs every part of a modern entertainment venue — tables, courts, turfs, consoles, PCs, VR pods and the cafe — from one cloud dashboard. Operators get online bookings with verified UPI/card payments, a fast POS, station/court timers, customer loyalty, tournament management and multi-branch reporting. Every feature ships only after it’s proven live at Cuephoria Gaming Lounge. 14-day free trial. No credit card.

## Product
- [Overview](https://cuetronix.com/): What Cuetronix is, who it’s built for, and how it runs a venue end-to-end.
- [Solutions](https://cuetronix.com/#solutions): Every vertical Cuetronix supports, with keyword-mapped cards.
- [Workflow](https://cuetronix.com/#workflow): A realistic day in a Cuetronix-powered lounge, from booking to checkout.
- [Features](https://cuetronix.com/#modules): POS, bookings, stations, cafe, loyalty, tournaments, reports.
- [Pricing](https://cuetronix.com/#pricing): Starter ₹1,999/mo · Growth ₹4,999/mo · Pro ₹9,999/mo · Enterprise on request.
- [FAQ](https://cuetronix.com/#faq): Answers to the most-asked operator questions.

## Verticals
- [Snooker billing software](https://cuetronix.com/#for-snooker): Per-frame / per-minute pricing, table deposits, happy-hour rules, leagues.
- [8-ball pool billing software](https://cuetronix.com/#for-8-ball): Pool hall POS with table transfers, combos and loyalty.
- [Turf booking software (football & cricket)](https://cuetronix.com/#for-turf): Slot booking, dynamic pricing, team captains, WhatsApp confirmations.
- [Box-cricket & futsal booking](https://cuetronix.com/#for-turf): Captain handles, team-split bills and recurring passes.
- [Pickleball, padel, badminton & tennis courts](https://cuetronix.com/#for-courts): Court bookings, coaches, memberships, league brackets.
- [PS5 & Xbox rental lounges](https://cuetronix.com/#for-consoles): Per-minute billing, combos, waitlists, family time limits.
- [PC esports cafes](https://cuetronix.com/#for-pc): PC gaming cafe billing, prepaid wallets, LAN tournaments.
- [VR arcades](https://cuetronix.com/#for-vr): Ticketed slots, headset rotation, liability waivers.
- [Bowling alleys](https://cuetronix.com/#for-bowling): Lane booking, shoe hire, league scoring, cafe.
- [Multi-sport FECs](https://cuetronix.com/#for-fec): Run cue sports, turfs, courts, consoles, VR and a cafe on one dashboard.

## Conversion pages
- [Start free trial](https://cuetronix.com/signup): 14-day trial, no credit card, live in under five minutes.
- [Book a demo](https://cuetronix.com/contact): Talk to the team, see a real venue dashboard.
